Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Charge Interest In Limited Liability Companies And In Partnership
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Sylvia M. Sokol, Esq., for Petitioners and moving party: Corvonrn LLC, Austin Court LLC and 2628 Telegragh Avenue LLC

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONERS CORVORN LLC, AUSTIN COURT LLC AND 2628 TELEGRAPH AVENUE L L C'S Motion for Order to Charge Interest in Limited Liability Companies Corvorn LLC, Austin Court LLC, 2628 Telegraph LLC, and Clare Tavern LLC is granted. Petitioners' Motion for Order to Charge Interest in Golene Partnership is granted.

The judgment in favor of Corvorn LLC and against Eileen Long was entered March 30, 2010 in the amount of $879,504.10. The judgment in favor of Austin Court LLC and against Eileen Long was entered March 30, 2010 in the amount of $706,318.38. The judgment in favor of 2628 Telegraph Avenue LLC and against Eileen Long was entered on March 30, 2010 in the amount of $92,633.10. Long's judgment debt to Petitioners totals $1,678,455.60, plus interest. The judgment remains wholly unsatisfied to date. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: DONALD J. SULLIVAN, not reported.
